info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Management API enables businesses to streamline user account creation and management processes. Utilizing this API, developers can efficiently register new users and handle account-related operations. Typical consumers include web and mobile application developers looking to integrate user authentication and onboarding features into their platforms. This API supports various functionalities encompassing user details, preferences, and account status, contributing to a seamless user experience.

post.description: This endpoint allows clients to create a new user account in the system. Ensure all required fields are provided in the request body to successfully create the account.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account. It must include all necessary information required for the account creation process, as defined in the schema.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again later.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

200.description: The request was successful, and the resource has been created.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error type.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A string containing the stack trace for debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing an error response for the POST operation on accounts.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer associated with the error (if applicable).

errorCode.description: A specific error code representing the type of error.

message.description: A message providing additional context about the error.
message.example: No account exists with the given ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: Detailed information about the specific error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for POST Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the circumstances of the error.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The request path that resulted in the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the error response for a POST operation on accounts that results in a 404 status.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

accountType.description: The type of account to be created (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: The currency for the account (e.g., USD, EUR).

initialDeposit.description: The initial deposit amount for the account, must be greater than or equal to zero.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the request body for creating a new account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: Type of the account (e.g., savings, checking, etc.).

status.description: Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

currency.description: Currency code representing the currency of the account balance.

message.description: Message related to the account creation process.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Response object for creating a new account. This object provides the details of the newly created account.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
